prompt: Create a dramatic wide cinematic anime fantasy illustration of an elderly male wizard casting fire magic. The wizard has long flowing white silver hair and a full beard, wearing a loose dark black robe with broad sleeves. His face is intentionally obscured by a simple centered square censor block in warm brown, covering the facial features while leaving the hair and beard visible. Compose him slightly left of center, torso angled toward the viewer, with one hand extended forward toward the right side and fingers spread as if controlling a massive spell; his other hand is raised lower on the left side in a claw-like gesture. On the right half of the image, show one enormous swirling orange fire orb or portal, like a miniature sun made of rotating flames, bright yellow core, molten orange rings, and licking flame trails spiraling around it. Add a second smaller visible flame mass near the lower left edge. Use exactly two prominent fire masses: the huge orb on the right and the smaller flame on the lower left. The background is a dark smoky cavern or stormy void with charcoal gray and black brushy textures, illuminated by fiery orange rim light and scattered glowing embers. Style: high-quality painterly anime key visual, dynamic action pose, strong contrast, cinematic lighting, energetic brush strokes, detailed flame motion, dramatic fantasy atmosphere, widescreen 16:9 composition, no text, no watermark.
